description: AA-10.4 cross-track composition gauntlet, compatibility matrix, and incident drill pack.

compatibility_matrix.description: Explicit classification of track combinations: supported, experimental, or forbidden.

combinations.description: Controllers observe and influence scheduling via snapshots and decisions.
Interference detection operates on controller decisions.
Controllers respect tail-latency budgets; rollback on regression.
Controller decisions are obligation-aware; cannot leak obligations.
Controllers execute inside sandbox membrane with attenuated tokens.
Controllers are rolled back and authority narrowed during crash recovery.
Recovery narrows authority; tokens revoked on crash, restored gradually.
Crash packs and journals integrate with trace intelligence for replay.
Transport experiments may affect tail latency budgets.
Transport failover interacts with crash-only recovery; not fully validated.
All core tracks composed. Transport (AA-08) remains experimental.

status_definitions.experimental: Per-track valid but composition has known gaps. Opt-in only.
status_definitions.forbidden: Composition known to be unsafe or semantically inconsistent.

incident_drills.description: Controller in Active mode triggers region crash. Verify: rollback, authority narrowing, journal, microreboot, re-promotion.
Tail latency budget exceeded triggers automatic controller rollback.
Obligation enters region, region crashes before settlement. Verify leak is detected and reported.
Root capability token revoked. Verify cascade to all descendants across domains.
Full-stack composition encounters multiple simultaneous failures. Verify graceful degradation.

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate compatibility matrix structure and combination coverage
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa104 cargo test --test cross_track_composition_contract matrix -- --nocapture

smoke_scenarios.description: Validate incident drill definitions and track coverage
smoke_scenarios.command: rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa104 cargo test --test cross_track_composition_contract drill -- --nocapture
rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-aa104 cargo test --test cross_track_composition_contract composition -- --nocapture
